name: Mango Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh mangoes, peel them and strip the flesh from the seeds by holding the fruit over a bowl to catch any juice.
2. Remove the seeds from the jalapeño peppers (or substitute with other mildly hot peppers) and chop finely.
3. Seed and chop the bell pepper(s).
4. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, stirring after each addition.
5. Add the mango pieces last to prevent them from becoming crushed.
6. Allow the salsa to stand for several hours or overnight before serving.
7. Stir, taste, and adjust the heat or other spices as desired.
8. Serve with tortilla chips, on eggs, or enjoy in any way you prefer.
